title: Ai Bot
author: onlysatira
selftext:
Guys, I decided to give you a gift, I see that there are a lot of you who want to get a bot.

I don’t have time to answer everyone at once.

That’s why I decided to do this: I will create a group for those who want to write their own bot and for those who already want to join our team.

The entrance to the group will be for a donation, but the donation is not for me, but for the help of my country. I will transfer all the funds to protect the sky.🇺🇦

Thank you very much for your support, thank you for being

Best regards 
Satira 
Lets trade together 📈📉

comments.author: IcedColdMine
comments.body: This guy is legit! 100% worth donating :)

replies.author: ilikerolls
replies.body: lol I’m not sure how more obvious anyone could make a scam. At least put some effort into it man!

replies.author: abcdecentralized
replies.body: But it is for a good cause, surely....

comments.author: Putrid-Secretary3440
comments.body: He totally sounds like his president ZE.

replies.author: onlysatira
replies.body:
Another one that no one needs. What does my president have to do with it?

The fact that I wanted to help you, to share with you a bot, my developments, for any donation in support of my country.

And you say it’s a scam ????

And I didn’t even specify any wallet or at least some data for sending funds, didn’t I?

replies.author: onlysatira
replies.body:
Sustify? Prove that it’s a scam... You’re just a pathetic person who can’t call or blame anything but someone.

Write me at least 1 argument, a finished creature.

replies.author: onlysatira
replies.body: That’s what I can say that you’re a stupid herd who writes this bullshit without any analysis. And even without any purpose, I don’t think you wanted to collect likes here.

comments.author: roulettewiz
comments.body:
A trading bot for Topstep and I'm in.

Also, curious about how much the donation should be

replies.author: onlysatira
replies.body: I’m a little late with everything right now. Let people be recruited for now, we’ll still have time to trade

replies.author: FairFlowAI
replies.body:
little remark, TopStep doesn’t like AI algorithm trading to much. Do you have experience what they exactly exclude with the phrase 

“Using any software, artificial intelligence, ultra-high speed, or mass Data entry that might manipulate, abuse, or give User an unfair advantage while using the Site or Services;”

https://help.topstep.com/en/articles/10296582-prohibited-conduct

replies.author: roulettewiz
replies.body: They're ok now. Since they released projectx we can trade via bots.

replies.author: FairFlowAI
replies.body: that’s good to know 👍 thanks for sharing

comments.author: Informal_Sky4655
comments.body:
Try this. You can get up to 3% Daily. Fully automated system.
